programme.desc: Luego de una primera noche salvaje, los Shore deciden pasar una tarde tranquila en la playa en donde aprovechan para hablar de lo sucedido la noche anterior y conocerse mejor. Llega la noche, los tragos, la fiesta y comienza la competencia.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Llega el nuevo "Boss" a la casa y los Shore descubren que sus obligaciones no son nada parecidas a lo que esperaban. Después de un día de trabajo nada mejor que unos drinks y lo que parecía una fiesta tranquila, termina en una noche de locura.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Luego del accidente de Fernando, Potro decide acompañarlo al hospital y las consecuencias de su caída no se hacen esperar. Una vez más llega el "Boss" a la casa para enviar a los Shore a un nuevo trabajo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Comienza un nuevo día en la casa Shore y la llegada del Boss emociona a casi todos los integrantes de las casa quienes salen a disfrutar de un nuevo y divertido día laboral. Al caer la noche los Shore deciden ir a un sitio más tranquilo.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Una invitada colombiana llega a la casa shore mientras Fernando tiene que irse de Acapulco para ver a su medico y decidir si puede terminar sus vacaciones en familia. Todo esta listo para la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes de la casa.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Erick llega a la casa Shore e inmediatamente empieza el coqueteo con una de las nuevas integrantes. La fiesta comienza y las comadres deciden pasar el día esposadas. Por fin llega la iniciación de los nuevos integrantes.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The Shores happily celebrate their last night in Guadalajara, since they will head out to Vallarta the next day. No one suspects that, there, the family will break up forever.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Every beginning has an end, and this family's end could not help but be the most chaotic, crazy and surreal of all of television.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: The first episode recapping the season's best moments, commented by the Shore cast. With unedited scenes and cast members uncovering truths that will leave us all speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore
programme.desc: Second and last episode recapping the season's best moments, commented by the Shore cast. With unedited scenes and cast members uncovering truths that will leave us all speechless.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Proof of True Love

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: Aunt Brenda
programme.desc: In the midst of general uncertainty due to Mane not being around and the lack of connection between Potro and Danik and Jawy and Gaby, the Shores will receive the most unexpected visit.

programme.title: Acapulco Shore: The Queen is Back
programme.desc: At the house, things with Brenda are flowing, the new members are getting more and more comfortable and the vacation is going well. The Shores can't wait for Mane to arrive and to see what happens between Jawy and Gaby.

programme.desc: The Shores enjoy a crazy night in Colombia. They say goodbye to Medellin as they return to the Riviera, where they receive another surprise.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma se da cuenta de quién es Fernanda y de la relación que lleva con Pedro, llora al creer que Leonardo la engaña. Elmer ve a Yesenia besándose con Rubén y les reclama. Pedro le pregunta a Basilio cómo debe hablar con su hermano.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Paloma y Leonardo discuten, él se va de casa. Ignacio le cuenta a su madre que Leonardo le dio un nombre falso a Paloma y le dijo que tenía amnesia. Leonardo va a casa de Renata, se encuentra a Santiago y logra recordar algo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Leonardo le dice a Santiago que siente que lo conoce y a él su voz le parece familiar. Fabiola intenta pegarle a Nora y Fernanda interviene. Renata tiene una teoría sobre Leonardo.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio visita a Paloma y en eso llega Leonardo, ella le cuenta que el perdió la memoria hace unos meses y que es hijo de Elmer. Citan a Ignacio y al llegar encuentra a Elmer apuntándole con una pistola. Leonardo recuerda a Ignacio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio trata de negociar con Elmer, pero éste le dispara. Leonardo comienza a recordar cada vez más cosas, va a ver a Paloma para decirle que el hombre que estaba en su casa se llama Ignacio.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio llega a la oficina de Pedro, le dice que ya sabe que él es Perico y lo amenaza con mandarlo a la cárcel, pero Pedro responde que él mismo se entregará. Santiago le pregunta a Fernanda por qué trabaja con los Fuentemayor.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio le dice a Pedro que guardará el secreto, pero tendrá que hacer lo que él le pida. Se da cuenta de que perdió su celular y manda a Elmer a buscarlo. Fabiola intenta atropellar a Yesenia.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Renata le pregunta a Inés si Pedro tuvo un hermano gemelo. Elmer se reúne con Pedro fuera de la casa y Leonardo los ve desde la ventana. Elmer le dice a Pedro que haga todo lo que Ignacio le pida.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Inés le cuenta toda la historia a Renata de los gemelos, ella le dice que Pedro necesita saber la verdad, pero Elmer se opone. Leonardo va a la casa de Paloma y le cuenta que vio a un tipo idéntico a él frente a su casa.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Pedro le dice a Fernanda que no sabe qué hizo él para que ella dejara de amarlo, se va de la casa. Inés le vuelve a preguntar a Elmer si el gemelo de Pedro murió. Localizan el celular de Ignacio e intentan robar a Cachito, pero Santiago lo salva.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Ignacio se entera de la devolución del brazalete, se hace pasar por el dueño y se entera de que fue Paloma quien lo devolvió. Le dice que es abogado y le ofrece su ayuda. La cita en un restaurante, ella ve a Pedro con Fernanda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de encontrar un cuerpo en el sitio de prueba de vehículos aéreos no tripulados, el equipo de NCIS debe determinar si la muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Luego de que Torres y Bishop sean víctimas de un atropello y fuga, Torres lucha por su vida en la UCI.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso en una investigación de asesinato del NCIS es una amiga de Gibbs, Phillip Brooks (Don Lake), que conoció en un sitio de citas. Además, Sloane tiene un admirador secreto en el Día de San Valentín.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras investigan el suicidio de un oficial de la Marina retirado, que dejó una moneda rara y valiosa en el Museo Nacional de la Marina. El equipo se imagina a sí mismo en la historia de su vida para reconstruir cómo la moneda quedó en su poder.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que una mujer es asesinada en su apartamento, Danny y Báez recurren a su hija, Margo, para pedir ayuda, pero en cambio ella complica la investigación.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El amigo de Frank, Lenny, le revela que un próximo artículo revelador expondrá algo de la ropa sucia del NYPD. Erin debe decidir cómo cargar a un médico cuyos tratamientos experimentales llevaron a la muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de un incidente en el que los refuerzos del oficial Witten no pudieron mantenerse físicamente a la par de una persecución, Frank debe decidir si implementar una prueba de aptitud más rigurosa para el NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Después de que alguien irrumpa en la casa de Luis Delgado y mate a su esposa, Luis y Danny se unen para atrapar al malvado asesino, quien también puede ser responsable de la muerte de Linda.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El UAC viaja a Rapid City después de que dos víctimas masculinas se descubren muertas por un ritual. Reid continúa lamentando la muerte de Maeve.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Twenty- four wild Southerners descend on a picturesque lakehouse in Georgia with $100,000 reasons to win big. But, only one team will split the payday.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Bullets fly as the rednecks shoot their way through another difficult challenge. As a new power couple emerges in the game, another team's new romance is put in jeopardy as they face elimination in The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rednecks must face their fears as the challenge takes them to new heights. A newly formed team must learn how to work together both on and off the playing field.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: An action-packed challenge sends the teams flying and lands one player in the hospital. Margaret continues to alienate the rest of the house while Cowboy and Cody almost come to blows.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The team bonds are tested when the Rednecks must rely on each other's strength and endurance to win the challenge. A new romance develops and causes controversy in the house.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A late-night prank angers the house and puts huge targets on the prankster's backs. The rednecks have a hard time keeping down what Steve is dishing up at the challenge and then a grudge match is settled at The Pit.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The pressures of the game are getting to some of the contestants and a wild night out causes tempers to flare. This week's challenge proves to be too much for two of the players to handle.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Tensions boil over as a relationship continues to create friction in the house. The rednecks must prove they have brains as well as brawn as the latest challenge puts them to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Down to the final 4 teams, the remaining rednecks plot to take out whoever stands in their way of making it to the end. At the challenge, the players put it all on the line as they overcome any obstacles standing in their way.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Having survived the competition so far, the day they've all been waiting for arrives as the final three teams battle it out in an epic race of strength, intelligence, and endurance.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings back 12 seasoned Redneck Island veterans and 12 eager new rookies to battle it out for $100,000. At the first challenge, the players dive into the competition as they fight it out to claim victory.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The game is turned on its head as one player quits the competition and another is seriously injured. The challenge turns physical as the teams fight to stay afloat.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The players must rise to the occasion as a daunting challenge pushes their limits to new heights. One of the veterans gets life-changing news from home. A powerful new alliance forms that changes the course of the game.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A budding romance between two teammates complicates their future in the game. The challenge forces the competitors to put their brains as well as their brawn to the test.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/19/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants and post-war uncertainty, by examining the country through personal stories, food and music.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A chatty motorist becomes agitated when officers start asking questions, a fleeing driver calls his wife in the middle of a pursuit, and deputies catch a man in a lie.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high speed vehicular pursuit results in a foot chase. Officers respond to a domestic call involving the residence's girlfriend and her children who destroyed the man's house. Police respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man hands police his gun unannounced, an oblivious suspect tries to make money ripping off two detectives, and a driver's inability to do simple math lands her in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to an armed robbery and carjacking, the suspects are arrested on several charges. A concerned sister reports a fight between her brother and a heavyset burglar.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: After leading police on a slow pursuit, a sharply-dressed driver has a heated talk with another deputy. In spite of her tears, police unravel a woman’s lies one-by-one. A traditionally bad omen turns into good luck for a couple.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Prostitute sting operations prove successful for undercover officers in both Wichita, KS and Palm Beach, FL. Officers inform an unsuspecting John that the individual offering up services is likely not who he thinks they are.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The rough terrain of a high-speed pursuit proves both dangerous and useful for deputies. Police find more than a stolen air conditioner in the trunk of a messy van. A confused man loses track of what’s in his pockets.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A generous boyfriend steps in to prevent his girlfriend from going to jail. Officers save a kitten who wants to hide in a dangerous place. A man says he’s been driving a stolen truck for one day, but he’s off by a few months.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man takes off running, a woman interferes with a traffic stop involving her boyfriend, and deputies respond to a dispute between a man and his girlfriend's son.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A distressed woman leads the cops to her abusive fiance, and a couple of officers are suspicious when they pull over an overly friendly man.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit ends abruptly when the suspect makes a wrong turn, and a nervous man attempts to hide his crime when he thinks no one can see him.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers pursue a vehicle traveling up to 100mph on a local freeway. An officer is dispatched to a larceny in progress at a local convenience store. A man threatens an elderly woman at their residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to drop his knife tests an officer's patience, neighbors hold an alleged thief until police arrive, and a couple of volatile newlyweds need police intervention.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a dirt bike tries to elude police while dumping his firearm, and after breaking up a parking lot drug deal, an officer advises a young suspect to make better choices.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call of a naked man inside a school. A woman being questioned by police is oblivious to her wardrobe malfunction. Officers on patrol order several female nude sunbathers to cover up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers stop a suspicious pedestrian, police and their K-9 dog search for weapons in a suspect's vehicle, and a wanted woman is stopped on a moped with her pet dog.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A repeat offender takes the police on a bumpy ride, a deputy finds paraphernalia in a teen's car, and a woman learns of her brother's drug habit during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police find a burglary suspect up a tree in a California backyard, a parolee at large attempts to flee officers, and a man with a suspended license blows his second chance.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man refusing to comply gets tased, recent texts on a suspect's phone paint a different story from what he's told officers, and a woman tries to hide evidence from police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Nick are called to investigate a murder at a fast food restaurant and have quite a task ahead of them when they discover that much of the evidence is coated in cooking oil.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: While Langston testifies in the trial of a respected Congressman, new evidence sends the CSIs back to the lab to reopen the investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to three different crime scenes in one night that are seemingly unrelated, but each case's forensic evidence reveals a common link.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSIs are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, Nick is thrown for a loop as he pieces together three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment over the course of a year.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in an usually calm Las Vegas community.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston is shocked when his former student is found murdered and becomes the focus of a CSI investigation into the world of Mexican wrestling.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nick's case of a deceased skydiver takes an interesting turn when Catherine discovers there may be a connection between the skydiver and a mysterious double murder case.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Hodges and Wendy run into each other at a science fiction convention for one of their favorite classic television shows, they end up investigating the murder of one of their beloved actors.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine revisits one of the very first cases she worked as a CSI when the convicted felon in the murder claims the verdict was based on faulty evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An unexplained illness that is affecting random citizens of Las Vegas baffles the CSIs.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A brutal motorcycle gang murder takes place in a biker bar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cache of missing chips from a closed down casino turn up in Vegas and a string of murders follow, leading Langston to use deadly force for the first time in his career as a CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When Sara unexpectedly returns, the CSI team come together to investigate the death of a famous young actress killed in a dubious traffic collision.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a porn producer and drug dealer are found dead in an upscale Vegas area, the CSIs focus their investigation on members of the neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y el equipo de CSI se ven envueltos en el mundo de la comedia de Hollywood cuando una diva de las comedias de situación (Sagal) muere prematuramente durante el rodaje de su programa en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick es acusado de asesinar a un famoso gángster de Las Vegas e incluso él no está seguro de su culpabilidad o inocencia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: En el estreno de la novena temporada, el equipo de CSI se une después de que Warrick recibe un disparo en un callejón de Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una hipnotizadora que usa sus poderes de persuasión para robar bancos se convierte en la principal sospechosa en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra una serie de víctimas fallecidas en medio de sus actividades cotidianas, el equipo de CSI debe determinar qué es lo que hace que permanezcan de pie después de la muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Durante el curso de una investigación, los CSI descubren que su víctima, una joven que fue asesinada y encontrada con varios tipos de sangre diferentes en su organismo, es hija de un criminal buscado.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI investiga un caso relacionado con el mundo de la dominación, Grissom visita a Lady Heather para encontrar algunas respuestas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Después de que ocurre un tiroteo que involucra a un niño justo en el medio de Koreatown, ninguno de los testigos hablará con el equipo de CSI que investiga el caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso de un caso de asesinato ocurrido hace 12 años pasa al primer plano de una nueva investigación del CSI.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una popular joven cantante es encontrada muerta afuera de un famoso club nocturno de Las Vegas, el equipo de CSI descubre un vínculo entre el crimen actual y un asesinato ocurrido hace más de 50 años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesinato lleva al CSI a investigar un psicópata que cumple cadena perpetua. Durante la investigación, Grissom acude a una conferencia del doctor Raymond Langston, un reputado patólogo criminal, para pedirle ayuda en el esclarecimiento del caso.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se sorprende y entristece cuando, después de trabajar con el Dr. Raymond Langston en los asesinatos de parejas, Grissom anuncia que su tiempo como CSI ha llegado a su fin y le ofrece a Langston un puesto permanente en el equipo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El primer día de trabajo del Dr. Langston va de mal en peor cuando un simple caso de robo rápidamente se superpone con un complicado caso de incendio provocado y homicidio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un agente del FBI que trabajaba encubierto es encontrado brutalmente asesinado, se llama al equipo de CSI para ayudar al compañero de la víctima a encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Miami Beach is evacuated for a tsunami, but the CSI team remains after discovering a bank robbery plot while investigating a seemingly random murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A string of dead bodies, found off the coast of Miami, turns out to be the work of modern-day pirates. Horatio and the team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An innocent man is killed when someone falls on him from a balcony. The CSI team is lead into the center of a high-level sex and murder scandal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A seemingly random carjacking turns out to be anything but when a young woman's gambling addiction becomes more than the family business can support.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A hospital emergency room shootout investigation puts the CSI team in the middle of a murder case involving the leader of a prominent street gang

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop ends in the murder of a patrolman. The CSI team must sort out a young girl's obsessive love affair in order to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A "Friction Party" at a private suite in one of the city's hotels accommodating hundreds of cruise passengers leaves a young woman dead.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?"

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a small jet crashes into a residential neighborhood, the wreckage reveals a corpse in the cargo hold, along with a half-million dollars in cash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The world of extreme skateboard videos turns deadly when the competition heats up inside the studio. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tax season gets off to a bang when two IRS agents turn up dead. Horatio Caine and the CSI Team are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: South Beach Miami’s sexiest nightclub becomes a hotbed of revenge when murder closes the doors on a unique dating service.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI tienen 24 horas para descubrir si un hombre condenado a muerte es realmente culpable y Eric Delko vuelve a trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI resuelven el homicidio de un hombre que fue asesinado en el espacio exterior antes de devolver su cuerpo a la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y Delko deben viajar a la brillante y soleada Los Ángeles cuando un secreto del pasado de Jesse quizá permita que un asesino quede libre.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI desentrañan el complicado misterio de un asesinato en un lugar de trabajo cuando encuentran a una odiada recepcionista asesinada en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Horatio Caine, Kyle, regresa de la guerra, busca la ayuda de su padre y del equipo de CSI para resolver un inquietante asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Las vacaciones de primavera elevan la cantidad de muertos en Miami cuando Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI se separan para resolver tres asesinatos diferentes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El espíritu de una víctima no dejará a Calleigh en paz hasta que ella haga justicia por su asesinato. Debe contar con la ayuda de Horatio y el resto del equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un robo de joyas aparentemente perfecto termina en asesinato y, cuando se roban pruebas del lugar del crimen del laboratorio, Delko regresa para encontrar al culpable.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una madre suburbana, el equipo de CSI descubre el oscuro pasado de su familia, mientras Delko continúa con su misión encubierta.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la exnovia de Horatio Caine muere en una explosión, el equipo busca dentro de su propio departamento para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie se burla del equipo de CSI dejándole pistas crípticas y cuanto más tarden en decodificar estos acertijos, mayor será la cantidad de muertos.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI sufre la trágica pérdida de uno de los suyos cuando un genio psicótico se descontrola en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una camarera en un club exclusivo, Horatio debe buscar en la lista de invitados más elitista de Miami para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Secuestran a una niña y el único testigo que tiene el equipo de CSI es un hombre ciego que oyó el secuestro, lo que lleva a Horatio a un viejo archienemigo.

programme.desc: When two bungee jumpers witness a death on the Brooklyn Bridge, Mac and his new love interest Peyton Driscoll are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A serial murderer leaves his victims in coded t-shirts. The team struggles to decode his mythological clues and put their main suspect behind bars.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Danny and Lindsay explore the worlds of goth and glam when a young girl that belongs to the underground “suicide girls” cult is found dead.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A young hotel employee falls to her death from a hotel rooftop after she becomes embroiled in a deal with a scheming top model.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac is summoned from a night at the opera to a bloody crime scene. Across town, a famous bachelor is found dead in his swim gym.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a paintball player is found shot to death, Flack realizes that a dirty cop under his supervision could be to blame.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: After a night of heavy partying two underage girls make the reckless decision to drive home. In route, the girls get into an accident.

programme.desc: Mac and Flack investigate the death of a parachute professional whose chute was pelted with dead pigeons causing him to plummet to the ground.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Hawkes is framed for shooting a bartender and then later sent to prison, the team takes to the street to set their investigator free.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella work with a deaf family to find their daughter’s killer. The team investigates the murder of a young skating sensation.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a rich real estate agent is found dead in a brownstone, Mac and Stella work with evidence that suggests he was either a kidnapper or kidnapee.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El detective Mac Taylor y Danny Messer van bajo tierra y entran al mundo de los hombres que excavan bajo la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La misión de los detectives Stella Bonasera y Danny Messer de encontrar a un violador brutal se ve obstaculizada, ya que la víctima no recuerda el ataque.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Una broma pesada se convierte en un misterio de un asesinato que abarca un siglo cuando un esqueleto colocado en un autobús turístico resulta ser auténtico.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI Investiga cuando el DJ más popular de Nueva York es encontrado muerto minutos antes de ser coronado campeón indiscutible de scratching.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El brutal apuñalamiento de una joven lleva a los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera a Stuyvesant Town, el epicentro de la clase media de la ciudad de Nueva York.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: En una prueba de fe, Mac Taylor asigna a los detectives Danny Messer y Aiden Burn a uno de los casos más difíciles del equipo de CSI hasta ahora.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Un robo en Chinatown sale mal cuando asesinan a un guardia de seguridad y el otro dispara por error a un tanque de gasolina y dos de los ladrones se queman vivos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: El pánico sobreviene en la Bolsa Mercantil de Nueva York cuando abandonan un maletín, rastrean su origen hasta un corredor de bolsa que desapareció misteriosamente.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Cuando a un oficial de la policía montada de la ciudad de Nueva York lo tiran de su caballo con un tiro, el detective Mac Taylor y el equipo peinan la ciudad en busca de sospechosos.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: La electrocución de un joven en el tercer riel del metro conduce al mundo de un deporte extremo donde correr riesgos es parte del juego.

programme.title: CSI: New York
programme.desc: Los dueños de perros competidores se convierten en los principales sospechosos de una investigación de asesinato cuando el detective Mac Taylor examina la muerte de un adiestrador de perros.

programme.desc: Los detectives Mac Taylor y Stella Bonasera descubren el cuerpo de un adolescente metido en una caja de 60 x 60 x 60 cm enterrada en la arena en Coney Island.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Vaneza descubrió que la bebé que adoptó es la nieta de su esposo y quiere revocar la adopción. Alberto fue a prisión por violación a su cuñada que tuvo un hijo y luego se suicidó.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Natasha inventó en Internet una historia de violencia de su marido contra ella. En otro caso, Claribel quiere que su hija desaloje la casa, pues María acusó de abuso sexual a su papá.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Luis y Jéssica fue a una excursión al Amazonas y sufrió un accidente mortal. Además, Josefina es un travesti que fue violado en la prisión de mujeres y en la de hombres.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Yuneidis trabajó de mesera en un bar, escribió un libro sobre prostitución, pero su jefe la desmiente. También, la hija de Carla y Ángel necesita un donante de médula ósea con urgencia.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Top Ten Shocking Family Feuds
programme.desc: We’re counting down the top ten most unbelievable moments of family faceoffs! Plus we’ll let you know what happened to some of these guests after they left our show and returned to their lives.

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Gerica met Skyler a year after Hurricane Katrina and is 100% sure that Skyler has to be the father of her son. Then, Sarah made the mistake of sleeping with 2 men years ago and thinks Johnny fathered her son! Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Don and Amy hired Jessica to babysit their 14-year old son Steven. Years later, Jessica claims that Steven’s the father of her kid! Plus, Marisol has taken 16 DNA tests to find the father of her child. Will test #17 be the final one?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 2 Women. 3 Babies. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Maury will reveal the results of paternity tests on today’s MAURY. Will Maury say “You ARE the father!” and are those the very words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: When Shalanda was 16 and pregnant, Cameron left her. Now, she and her mom want him to help raise their kid! James says he's had unprotected sex 500 times and is sterile since a childhood accident, but Kadee says he's the dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: We'll revisit the wildest and most outrageous teens! 19-year old Tay slept with Kyle once and got pregnant. Then, wild party girl Hanna, met John when she was 19 and cheated on him twice, both times when she conceived her 2 kids. Who are the dads?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Jennifer needed a ride, but found love instead. But is her man Clarence using his taxi for picking up other women? Then, Lisa and her son Shawn think that David is cheating on her and want him out of their lives?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These guests say they're positive they know the true identity of the father of their children, but they just need a DNA test to prove it. Now the results are about to be revealed, but will they be the results they were hoping for?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: These moms are desperate to find their children's missing fathers. But these denying dads say that there's no way they're the real fathers. When the DNA results are revealed, who will be proven right and who will be still searching for answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking secret to tell her boyfriend. But the secret involves his childhood best friend. Jen says that her husband is a cheater and has proof! Will these relationships survive?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Elizabeth swears that a psychic told her and her whole family that her son Nehemiah didn't father Ja'Quasia's baby. But Ja'Quasia doesn't believe in a crystal ball. Then, Heidi and Tabbi claim AJ fathered their kids, but AJ only believes Tabbi!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Imagine finding out that the person you've been sharing your life with has been keeping a secret. MAURY's guests say they need to tell the truth – and some of them confess to more than cheating!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Teen mom Casie is dead set on proving Casey is the dad. Is Dirk the father of Brooke’s baby? Which brother fathered Miranda’s baby? Brandon denies both of Me'Chelle's kids but even his mother is on Me'Chelle's side!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kiley suspects that her husband Eli is cheating with her mother! Tanika is done with her fiancé’s lies. Plus, Daysha suspects that her man wants to leave her for a more “experienced” woman.

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Toni’s fiancée is a tattoo artist and wants to know if he’s been making his mark in bed with other women. Is Sandy’s fiancé cheating with married women? Is Juanita's fiancé a cheater?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Kisha wants to know why she found her sister Kim and her husband Shannon in bed together watching The Maury Show. She also found a photo of Shannon on Kim's phone! Then, Joe's wife Melissa caught him sending a racy photo to her best friend Brandy!

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Keith is terrified that Chyna cheated and their daughter may not be his. Could Keith’s best friend be the real father? Will the DNA results quash Omar's denials about fathering Jennifer’s child?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Billy is convinced that Heather is having a secret affair with her best friend Tara. Then, Jennifer found a shocking message on Facebook about her husband Skky. What happens when she sees what Maury caught on tape while Skky was in the green room!

programme.desc: Cuando una maestra dedicada y respetada desapareció, la policía tuvo que determinar si se había ido de vacaciones sin decírselo a nadie, o si era víctima de un juego sucio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre, Tammy Tatum, fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Fue uno de los casos más inusuales en la historia forense. Los investigadores tuvieron que encontrar una manera de resolver un caso de asesinato con una evidencia que consistía en un tomate aplastado encontrado en la escena del crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los excursionistas cerca de Anchorage, Alaska, descubrieron un cuerpo envuelto en sábanas con bordes de costura naranja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2002, el director de la funeraria, Lonnie Turner, fue encontrado muerto a tiros. Su hijo, Lonnie júnior, se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, particularmente después de que se descubriera que el asesinato se cometió con su arma.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Un recuerdo conmovedor
programme.desc: Una niña inteligente de Visalia, California recuerda dejar huellas dactilares en el vehículo de su secuestrador cuando es secuestrada, lo que ayuda a la policía en su búsqueda junto con una huella de neumático en el barro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora
programme.desc: Armada con solo eso, la policía esperaba que las huellas de zapatos encontradas en la escena del crimen de Michigan, volvieran a encarrilar su investigación sobre el asesinato de Audrey Nichols.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un pediatra, provocada por la misteriosa muerte de uno de sus pacientes, conduce a un hospital de Texas donde la tasa de mortalidad pediátrica es más alta que en cualquier hospital del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra a un popular profesor de gimnasia muerto por lo que parece ser una herida de bala accidental, su familia se pone sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El cuerpo de una atractiva joven fue encontrado a una milla de su auto abandonado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La policía de Seattle no tenía sospechosos en el violento asesinato de la cantante post-grunge, Mia Zapata.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Ahogamiento seco
programme.desc: Cuando Genell Plude es encontrada muerta en su baño, la escena apunta a un suicidio.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Rosemary Anderson es encontrada muerta a un lado de la carretera, su novio se convierte en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se descubrió un esqueleto humano en las marismas de Carolina del Norte y, cuando los investigadores descubrieron que había estado muerta durante 18 meses, sabían que sería difícil descubrir quién era, y mucho más quién la mató.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pistas reveladoras
programme.desc: La desaparición de la atleta universitaria de Filadelfia, Aimee Willard, es investigada después de que su carro fuera encontrado al costado de la carretera.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Plato frío
programme.desc: Un hombre murió en su casa después de una larga historia de enfermedad cardíaca. Se asumió que esta fue la causa de su muerte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una investigación sobre un asesinato se ve favorecida por un requisito legal de que los bares tengan cámaras de video instaladas en las instalaciones. Video, cabello y sangre conducen al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Llamado desde Casa
programme.desc: Una investigación de asesinato en Florida atraviesa jurisdicciones de New York y Jamaica.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: This episode explains how the 120-million-year reign of the dinosaurs ended when mammals became the fastest and fiercest creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Science of Walking With Beasts
programme.desc: A look at the science that has proved Darwin's idea that intelligent, sophisticated humans have an ancestral connection with the ape.

programme.title: How to Build a Dinosaur
programme.desc: Dinosaurs died out 65 million years ago and we have hardly ever found a complete skeleton. So how do we turn a pile of broken bones into a dinosaur exhibit? Dr Alice Roberts finds out how the experts put skeletons back together.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David travels the world to unravel some of the wonders and puzzles of palaeontology. But how do you find the world's oldest and rarest reptile?

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: Could pterodactyls fly? And why did trilobites have such good eyes? David Attenborough investigates the secret lives of animals from the past, as told in the fossil record.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers dinosaur bones in the Sahara desert and visits the biggest, most spectacular dinosaur displays in the world.

programme.title: Lost Worlds: Vanished Lives
programme.desc: David Attenborough uncovers bizarre creatures of the earliest seas, tiny horses the size of spaniels and an animal that's half bird and half reptile - the rarest of them all.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The evolution of the predators who lived 550 million years ago, and how the first amphibians migrated from sea to land.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Three hundred million years ago, the forests were ruled by insects. This was a world in which giant dragonflies battled with two-foot-wide spiders.

programme.title: Walking with Monsters: Life Before Dinosaurs
programme.desc: On the supercontinent Pangea, early therapsids, creatures more similar to mammals than reptiles, fight for survival alongside other animals. In the carboniferous swamps, insects and arthropods take over and grow into giants.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Scientists investigate the meteorite impact responsible for the extinction of dinosaurs. According to a theory, the event was triggered by a comet hitting the present-day Gulf of Mexico.

programme.title: Horizon
programme.desc: Exploring Mongolia's Gobi Desert to determine whether dinosaurs exist in the present as birds. It is one of the harshest places on Earth with the biggest dinosaur graveyard.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Bird expert Bill Oddie helps construct amazing, life-sized, bio-mechanical replicas as he presents an imaginary battle between a tyrannosaurus rex and a triceratops.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Doctor and his friends have been given shelter from the Daleks by the Aridians. But the Daleks threaten to kill the Aridians unless they hand over the time travellers.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Daleks pursue the TARDIS through time and space. In an attempt to lose the Daleks, the Doctor makes a stop on the top of the Empire State Building and then on a sailing ship.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: With the Daleks in pursuit, the TARDIS lands in what appears to be a haunted house. When the Daleks arrive, the travellers depart, not realising that they have left Vicki behind!

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Daleks follow the TARDIS to the jungle world of Mechanus which is infested with lethal plants. There the Daleks release a robot double of the Doctor that is programmed to kill.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase
programme.desc: The Doctor and his friends are taken prisoner by the Mechonoids. There they meet fellow prisoner, Steven Taylor. The Daleks break into the Mechonoid city and a battle commences.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives on 21st Century Earth where all long-distance journeys are made instantaneously by T-Mat. But aliens have invaded the T-Mat relay station on the Moon...

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: With the commerce of the world grinding to a halt, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe agree to investigate and set off for the Moon in an old fashioned rocket.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: On the Moon, the Doctor is captured by the Ice Warriors and learns that they intend to use T-Mat to spread a deadly fungus across the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: As the Martian fungus begins to spread, Zoe, Jamie, and Gia Kelly attempt to strike back against Slaar and his occupying force of Ice Warriors.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: An Ice Warrior invasion fleet is on its way to the Moon. Back on Earth, the Doctor devises a plan to destroy the Martian fungus.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death
programme.desc: Returning to the Moonbase, the Doctor confronts Slaar and the remaining Ice Warriors and must find a way of deflecting the invasion fleet that is heading towards them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The TARDIS arrives in no man’s land during World War I. Rescued from the Germans, the travellers are put on trial by the British General Smythe who is not all he seems.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ from where the war games are controlled. Carstairs is reconditioned and exposes the Doctor and Zoe as German spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: In the American Civil War zone, Jamie and Lady Jennifer join forces with resistance fighters from various time zones and prepare to launch an attack on Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor sends Zoe to the war zones to assemble a resistance force. The Doctor remains in Central Control to steal the processing machine, but the War Chief is one step ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor, Jamie, and Carstairs have escaped back to the 1917 war zone, but General Smythe is waiting for them and opens fire on them with a machine gun.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor is captured by the War Chief who belongs to the same race of people as the Doctor and offers an alliance. In the 1917 zone fighters prepare to attack Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The war games are over and the Doctor is put on trial by the Time Lords for breaking the laws of time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the newly regenerated Doctor to Earth to begin his exile. Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart leads a UNIT investigation into a mysterious meteorite shower.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: A recovered Doctor escapes the hospital and joins UNIT in their investigation. Meanwhile, Channing directs one of his Auton servants to recover a meteorite.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: Sam Seeley has found one of the meteorites but the Autons want it back and are closing in. General Scobie visits Auto Plastics, playing into the hands of Channing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The invasion begins as Auton shop dummies come to life and attack the public. The Doctor and UNIT infiltrate Auto Plastics where the Doctor faces the Nestene consciousness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: UNIT is at a project run by Professor Stahlman who intends to penetrate Earth’s crust. But the drilling has already released something deadly from beneath the Earth’s surface.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pekingese who refuses to eat or drink; a Chihuahua who bites people; two chow mixes who share a home but won't play nice with each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two German shepherds who get along fine at home, but are at each other's throats when at daycare; a miniature schnauzer that barks when her owner's grandchildren visit.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A great Dane bites her owner; a bearded collie with dog aggression; a mouthy French mastiff.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Two Chihuahuas who fight whenever they are in the same room; a dog who attempts to prevent his owner's boyfriend from leaving the house; a dog who is obsessed with moving water.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar revisits some of his toughest cases and explores the history or misunderstood dog breeds to dispel myths about aggression.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Wildest Islands: The Hebrides - Land of Legends
programme.desc: Lying just off the coast of west Scotland, the Hebrides archipelago is made up of more than 500 islands and islets. Isolation from the mainland has made it the perfect breeding ground for millions of creatures.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Seychelles

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Croatia - Split
programme.desc: Life moves at a different pace along this cultural center of Dalmatia.U+00A0 The most prized islands are off the coast of Split, and Ashley finds the oldest and last grappa distillery on the island of Hvar- using an ancient recipe.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: During a rabies vaccination campaign Niven struggles to vaccinate a nervous dog. Will he see the task through or will his impatient nature let him down? An unvaccinated dog is a danger to the community.

programme.title: Predators of a Different Kind - In the World of the Unknown Sharks
programme.desc: With the aid of modern technology, reveal the unknown behaviour of some unusual species of shark: lemon sharks and their white-tip reef counterparts.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Brazil

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: In Anchorage, one bird rules the roost…the Bald Eagle. Expert hunters are perfectly adapted to life in tough arctic conditions, but in Anchorage, the secret to their survival… is trash.

programme.title: Disruptive Nature
programme.desc: 2011 Tohuku Earthquake Japan. The most powerful earthquake ever recorded in Japan, and the fourth most powerful earthquake in the world.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Water is a vital element for the survival of all living beings on Planet Earth. From the top of the mountains where the rivers begin to run, to their final destination, we will get to know the animals and landscapes that cross the heart of Wild Portugal.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Switzerland - Matterhorn
programme.desc: Ashley trains hard to climb the 6th most dangerous mountain in the world, the Matterhorn. Celebrating the 150 anniversary of the first climb by Edward Whymper, find out if Ashley makes it to the pinnacle.

programme.title: End Of The Big Cats
programme.desc: Prosecuted for many decades, Africa's lion population has declined to only twenty thousand, and many biologists and conservationists are starting an international campaign to save these extraordinary animals.

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 1
programme.desc: The rains have finally arrived in the Kalahari and the vast desert has never looked better. Cleo, the boss of this small group of wild meerkats has given birth to five new pups.

programme.title: Hurricane: The Anatomy
programme.desc: Over millions of years, nature has evolved to deal with the strongest storms on the planet. This episode looks at varying strategies used by plants and animals that live in the hurricane zone and how they cope with the annual onslaught.

programme.title: Life Stories: Behaviour For Life: Life Stories Special
programme.desc: The biggest show on Earth is wildlife in action. Fight, communicate, build, love, breed, and eat: these are the basic animal behaviours. This series treat them all, one by one.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Utila

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: One of the most extraordinary forests in the world grows on top of volcanic cones, between rocks and ashes. This is the Canary pine, capable of growing after a fire.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: There are more Caribou in Alaska than people! Across the Arctic, they're the lifeblood of many remote communities. But human expansion, and wild predators, have led to their rapid decline.

programme.title: Wildest Indochina
programme.desc: Thailand is a land of extremes. A country shaped by wild forces, where animals face tough challenges to survive. Forming part of a biodiversity hotspot Thailand encompasses a diverse range of habitats.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: At the wedding of Eric's best friend, the groom is attack and the bride goes missing, pushing Brooke into the work mode.

programme.desc: Cam and Reggie reunite with a childhood friend whose basketball dreams were derailed by a stint in prison; Cassie looks for houses; Cam is offered a shoe endorsement deal.

programme.desc: En un caluroso día de verano de 1934, se hizo un descubrimiento aterrador en un baúl en la consigna de equipaje de la estación de tren de Brighton.

programme.title: Mapas de Asesinatos: Los asesinatos del baño de ácido
programme.desc: Mientras la policía investigaba la desaparición de la adinerada viuda Olive Durand Deacon, a principios de 1949, no podrían haber imaginado la espantosa confesión.

programme.title: Mapas de Asesinatos: Los asesinatos del camino de sirga
programme.desc: El día antes de la coronación de la reina Isabel II, el cuerpo de una adolescente fue encontrado flotando en el río Támesis.

programme.title: Mapas de Asesinatos: Ruth Ellis
programme.desc: Ruth Ellis fue la última mujer ahorcada en Gran Bretaña.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Un depredador escurridizo estaba suelto en el rural sur de California: alguien que secuestraba mujeres del frente de sus casas a plena luz del día.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Cuando un joven y su madre fueron secuestrados y asesinados por un temible cartel de drogas, los agentes del FBI en el campo trabajaron sin descanso para colarse en el submundo secreto de las drogas y sacar a la luz a los que estaban involucrados.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: La fuerza de policía local quedó atónita cuando el cuerpo de una mujer joven no identificada apareció en una vía en su pequeña ciudad de Pensilvania.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los estragos de un asesino en serie fueron descubiertos cuando los cuerpos de varias mujeres jóvenes comenzaron a aparecer en tumbas poco profundas que salpicaron el ambiente silvestre de Alaska.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En la costa del golfo de Misisipi, un juez y su esposa política fueron asesinados de manera salvaje dentro de su casa.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: La corrupción en el Departamento de Policía de Nueva Orleans se expandió como un cáncer a principios de 1990.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Los residentes de la pequeña ciudad de Noel, Misuri, quedaron sorprendidos cuando uno de sus bancos fue robado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Desde mayo hasta julio de 1984, Alton Coleman y su pareja de hecho, Denis Brown, se involucraron en una ola de asesinatos que atravesó seis estados y que dejó ocho personas muertas, entre ellos, niños.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: Una joven madre y su hijo desaparecieron misteriosamente de su casa. El esposo de la mujer era el único sospechoso, pero luego quedó descartado.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
programme.desc: En 1980, el FBI comenzó una extensa búsqueda de operación encubierta, de nombre en código "Safebet", que fue diseñada para exponer la infiltración de la mafia de Chicago en los alrededores de los suburbios de la ciudad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: It's premiere night for the guidos as they screen a movie they made in Mike's honor. Then, they cram eight months into one night when they re-enact all the moments Mike missed while he was away in prison.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The guys need some GTL. Angelina needs a prenup lawyer, and Deana and Nicole need to go home — to get two little meatball surprises for Mike.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni and Angelina clear the air, and Operation Crash the Bachelorette is in full effect as Mike, Vinny, and Pauly hatch a plan to crash the girls' weekend in NOLA.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Jenni is coming for Vinny's head, and is that a bird, a plane or The Designation?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: As the countdown to Angelina's wedding begins, Mike is moving on up and Pauly D and Jenni's wild night has the roomies asking a lot of questions.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: The big day is finally here! Jenni is feeling cursed, Angelina is feeling blessed, and Mike is feeling a little orange.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Angelina and Chris tie the knot. Vinny objects. And the girls' speech in honor of the bride leads to a roomful of Staten Island boos.

programme.desc: Sherrita thinks her Aunt Crystal spends all her money on clothes so she's suing her for car payments and car repairs.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.

programme.desc: Delores says her twin sister agreed to split her medical bills when she became ill while planning her party.

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Jill is suing Laura after failing to repay a loan, but Laura says it was a gift.

programme.desc: When Paul's expensive remote control helicopter "disappears" from Sean's consignment shop, Paul claims foul play.

programme.title: People's Court

programme.desc: Nicole is suing the man she rented a room from after making her uncomfortable and changing the locks after a fight.

programme.desc: Anthony wants David to pay over $1300 in rent and belongings he claims David trashed.

programme.title: People's Court

programme.title: People's Court

programme.title: People's Court
programme.desc: Anita is being sued after repossessing a car she believes to be hers, but who does the car really belong to?

programme.title: People's Court

programme.title: Chickpea and Friends
programme.desc: Join in the fun with Chickpea and her friends in this sport themed compilation of songs, stories, and games. / Join in the fun with Chickpea and her friends in this weather themed compilation of songs, stories, and games.

programme.desc: Join in the fun with Chickpea and her friends in this color themed compilation of songs, stories, and games. / Let's play with Chickpea and her friends in this themed compilation of songs, stories, and games.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 1 of 2. After a battle with Cobra a, Shipwreck is wounded and wakes up in the quaint town of Springfield. The battle actually took place years ago, and Springfield is now his home with his wife Mara, but something doesn't feel right.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2. Shipwreck discovers he's living in a Cobra nightmare! Not only is he stuck in a town completely under Cobra control, but the town sits atop its largest base of operations… and the entire population of both is looking for him!

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When a surprise attack by Cobra reveals that the Joes have gotten sloppy, General Hawk enlists Sergeant Slaughter to whip the team back into shape. Meanwhile, Dr. Mindbender plots to build a new Cobra leader from the DNA of famous historic conquerors.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes send teams across the world to prevent Dr. Mindbender from obtaining the DNA of famous and ruthless conquerors. While guarding the tomb of Ivan the terrible, Duke's team and the Oktober Guard struggle to fend off an attack by Cobra's BATs.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Dr. Mindbender continues his mission to collect the DNA of ancient conquerors. After Sergeant Slaughter retrieves a DNA pack from Cobra's raid on Sun Tzu's tomb, the Joes suspect that Cobra is building a new breed of soldiers and set out to stop them.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: The Joes invade Cobra Island to rescue one of their own and discover Cobra's master plan for the DNA they've been gathering: to create a Cobra Emperor called Serpentor.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: While the Joes are on a rescue mission at Cobra Island, Serpentor launches a full-scale assault on Washington D.C. With no time to lose, the Joes must work quickly to stop the Cobra Emperor before the whole world is doomed.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: When Cobra threatens to destroy the US coastline with a giant vortex, Lady Jaye goes on an undercover mission to learn more about the Cobra weapon that can create destructive whirlpools and tidal waves.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: After a space probe containing anti-matter crashes into the ocean, the Joes race to retrieve the probe before Cobra finds out about it, but Zarana is already on a mission of her own to sabotage their operation.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: While at the decommissioning ceremony for the battleship U.S.S. Montana, G.I. Joe comes under attack by Cobra and the ship's former captain, Admiral Lattimer, who is unwilling to see his aged vessel get scrapped.

programme.title: GI Joe: A Real American Hero
programme.desc: Cobra use an Asian tree sap to brainwash a local village and force the people to collect the sap for them. When G.I. Joe learns that Cobra is trying to market the sap as chewing gum, they raid the village to help the people and thwart Cobra's plan.
